parameters.jsonBody: ={{ JSON.stringify({ model: 'llama-3.1-8b-instant', temperature: 0.2, messages: [{ role: 'system', content: 'Extract key facts and user preferences from this conversation. Return ONLY a JSON array of objects with shape {"category": "profile|preference|fact", "key": "string", "value": "string"}. Be concise.' }, { role: 'user', content: 'User: ' + ($json.inputText || '') + '\nAssistant: ' + ($json.responseText || '') }] }) }}
